channel.title: Dimension 20
channel.description: Latest releases from Dimension 20 on Dropout.tv

item.title: Life Begins at Night
item.description:
LaVonte and HJ seek business prospects, while Zaeth and Mitch and make an underground discovery.

Duration: 2:19:22

Tags: Dimension 20, City Council of Darkness, vampires, goth, punk, supernatural, paranormal, monsters, absurd, surreal, quirky, witty and clever, charming, horror, dark comedy, tabletop rpg, vampire: the masquerade, what we do in the shadows, parks and recreation, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: Blood, Business, and Beth's Husband
item.description:
The coterie is thirsty for more than blood but their first night in town leaves much to be desired.

Duration: 1:48:43

Tags: Dimension 20, City Council of Darkness, vampires, goth, punk, supernatural, paranormal, monsters, absurd, surreal, quirky, witty and clever, charming, horror, dark comedy, tabletop rpg, vampire: the masquerade, what we do in the shadows, parks and recreation, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: Mishaps, A Maw, and the Masquerade
item.description:
A coterie of misfit vampires attempt to make big moves in undead society.

Duration: 2:00:38

Tags: Dimension 20, City Council of Darkness, vampires, goth, punk, supernatural, paranormal, monsters, absurd, surreal, quirky, witty and clever, charming, horror, dark comedy, tabletop rpg, vampire: the masquerade, what we do in the shadows, parks and recreation, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: Dimension 20: City Council of Darkness Game Mechanics Explainer
item.description:
Dimension 20 lorekeeper Skye gives a rundown of the game system used in City Council Darkness.

Duration: 06:09

Tags: Dimension 20, City Council of Darkness, vampires, goth, punk, supernatural, paranormal, monsters, absurd, surreal, quirky, witty and clever, charming, horror, dark comedy, tabletop rpg, vampire: the masquerade, skye smith, game mechanics, rules

item.title: D20 on a Bus: Season 2
item.description:
Blue M&M, Army Man, Hat, and Lint return to navigate the road to LAX - and their own sordid pasts.

Duration: 55:02

Tags: Dimension 20, D20 on a Bus, travel, transportation, weddings, marriage, family, accents, absurd, chaos, experimental, meta, jasmine bhullar, aabria iyengar, matthew mercer, brennan lee mulligan, katie marovitch
